_comment: Saudi macro context aligned to the seed financials quarters (2023Q3-2026Q2). brent_usd = quarterly average Brent crude (USD/bbl); sama_repo_pct = SAMA repo policy rate at quarter end (%, tracks the Fed via the USD peg). Values through 2025 track actual history; 2026 quarters are demo projections consistent with the synthetic seed narrative.
context_en: SAR is pegged to USD at 3.75, so SAMA policy rates track the US Fed.

Oil transmission: Brent -> government revenue and spending -> banking-system liquidity, credit growth and non-oil activity (Vision 2030 / PIF projects). Direct channel for Energy (Aramco top line) and Materials (petrochemical feedstock/product spreads).
Zakat (2.5% of zakat base) applies to Saudi-owned listed companies instead of income tax.
